description_long: This is a classic black top hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat, wide brim. The crown is smooth and rises vertically with a slight taper, giving it a formal and elegant appearance. The brim is flat, extends evenly around the base, and appears to be slightly upturned at the edges. The hat is uniformly black with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Its surface has a matte finish, suggesting it is made from felt or a similar fabric, commonly used in traditional top hats. The overall design is formal and timeless, suitable for ceremonial or dress occasions in urban environments.
description: A classic black top hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat, wide brim, featuring a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat, circular crown and the even, wide brim.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the tall, cylindrical crown and the flat, wide brim.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 1, with the crown and brim proportions clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the uniform height of the crown and the consistent width of the brim.
